scripts.build:backend-bin: cd backend && uv run pyinstaller --onefile --name fastapi-server --hidden-import uvicorn.logging --hidden-import uvicorn.loops --hidden-import uvicorn.loops.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.http --hidden-import uvicorn.protocols.http.auto --hidden-import uvicorn.lifespan --hidden-import uvicorn.lifespan.on server.py && cp dist/fastapi-server ../src-tauri/binaries/fastapi-server-$(rustc -Vv | grep host | cut -d' ' -f2)
